description: Letter from Mevorakh b. Natan to Thiqat al-Mulk. In Judaeo-Arabic. Mevorakh describes his financial difficulties and asks for help obtaining wheat. He complains that al-Shaykh al-ʿAfīf Masarra had failed to provide wheat to Mevorakh's family during his absence on a journey (r9–11). When Mevorakh returned, he found his family sick and perishing of hunger (r6–7). (Information from Mediterranean Society, IV, pp. 243, 439)
tags: Illness, mazalim, wine, tawqi', Mevorakh b. Natan, sultan, illness: household, illness: marad, illness letter 969-1517, wali
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
